name: Inn Trouble
short_description: A small game focused on furniture placement, optimization, and upgrades within a magic inn. Cater to the preferences of your fairytale guests, but beware: even the furniture has its own ideas about where it should go! Unwind in cozy mode or ramp up the difficulty for a real challenge.
detailed_description:
Inn Trouble: Furnish Your Fairy Tale Inn

Step into Inn Trouble, where you manage a cozy fairy tale inn. Your inn is pre-built, but furnishing it is key: arrange furniture for harmony and to delight your whimsical guests. Upgrade and adapt through charming chaos and unpredictability.

Artful Furnishing

In Inn Trouble, furnishing is crucial. Arrange furniture to create harmony bonuses—like placing a bed near a wardrobe—and choose styles that match your guests’ preferences to maximize their satisfaction.

Quirky Fairy Tale Guests

Host a variety of fairy tale characters, each with unique furniture tastes. Some love certain styles, tolerate others, and dislike the rest. Happy guests boost your income—for example, vampires despise knight beds.

Transformative Upgrades

Upgrade extensively: furniture can be improved multiple times, enhancing both function and aesthetics. Watch your inn transform as items become more beautiful. Also, upgrade amenities like elevators and your innkeeper’s abilities.

Endless Adventures

Each playthrough offers a new experience with randomized inn layouts, furniture, and guests. Adapt to these changes using your skills and tools, making every game uniquely challenging and replayable.

Her Majesty the Queen

Your final test is to serve Her Majesty the Queen. She has exceptionally high standards of beauty and style and will accept nothing but the very best. While she can be appreciative, she can also be extremely disappointed—and you don’t want to find out what happens then.

Tailored Difficulty

Choose from four difficulty levels to match your desired experience: from a relaxing, failure-free mode to challenging settings that will test even experienced players.

Enjoy the "troubles" in Inn Trouble!

supported_languages:
English*, French*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Russian*, Simplified Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
